mapper.select:
SELECT a.org_id, a.org_code, a.org_name, a.org_level, a.org_sts, a.up_org_id, g.org_name AS up_org_name, g.org_code AS up_org_code, a.last_chg_dt, a.last_chg_usr, u.user_name AS last_chg_name FROM admin_sm_org a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON u.user_id = a.last_chg_usr LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org g ON g.org_ID = a.up_org_id
order by ${sort}

SELECT o.*, uo.org_name AS up_org_name, uo.org_code AS up_org_code, u.user_name AS last_chg_name FROM admin_sm_org o LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org uo ON uo.org_id = o.up_org_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON o.last_chg_usr = u.user_id WHERE o.org_id = #{orgId}
select T1.ORG_CODE as orgId,T1.ORG_NAME, T1.ORG_LEVEL, T1.UP_ORG_ID from admin_sm_org T1 ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT a.org_id, a.org_code, b.org_seq FROM admin_sm_org a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org b ON a.up_org_id = b.org_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
SELECT DATA_TENANT_ID as tenantid ,COUNT(DATA_TENANT_ID) as tenantcount FROM admin_sm_org GROUP BY DATA_TENANT_ID
select org_id, instu_id, org_code, org_name, up_org_id, org_level, org_sts, last_chg_usr, last_chg_dt,org_seq from admin_sm_org ${ew.customSqlSegment}
